abilities.name: Let's Make a Deal
abilities.text:
Mr. Devil is a great negotiator, and would love to do business with your opponent on your behalf.

Select one deal from Mr. Devil's briefcase to offer to your opponent, and one deal you'd like in exchange (you choose the order they resolve in. Your opponent chooses what monster their half of the deal targets).

Mr. Devil's Deals:
1. Target monster heals for d10 HP OR gains d3 Action Tokens.
2. Teleport a monster to anywhere on the board (the same monster cannot be targeted twice by both players).
3. Gain d10 [[kw:energy|energy]] OR target monster gains 2 Action Tokens.

If they wish, your opponent can negotiate a counter offer. You can even offer each other something other than what's listed here. Repeat this process until you have arrived at an arrangement.

If an agreement cannot be met, the deal is off, and nothing happens. Perhaps Mr. Devil will look for someone weaker to do business with.

abilities.name: An Offer They Can't Refuse
abilities.text:
Mr. Devil knows that sometimes it's not just about how you negotiate; it's who you negotiate with.

Choose an enemy monster within 1" of Mr. Devil. That monster takes an [[kw:emotional-instability|Emotional Instability]] test.

If the test is failed, the enemy monster has crumbled under the pressure of Mr. Devil's powerful negotiation skills, and chosen to make a deal without your opponent's consent. Select 1 of the 3 deals from Mr. Devil's briefcase you'd like to receive. Then, select a deal to give to your opponent (you choose who gets their deal first. Your opponent chooses which half of deals 1 and 3 they take, and also what monster their deal targets).

Mr. Devil's Deals:
1. Target monster heals for d10 HP OR gains d3 Action Tokens.
2. Teleport a monster to anywhere on the board (the same monster cannot be targeted twice by both players).
3. Gain d10 [[kw:energy|energy]] OR target monster gains 2 Action Tokens.

If the EmI test is passed, Mr. Devil will have to set an example. Make a free Basic Attack against that monster.

A player can only receive 1 deal per turn.
